values.gpt: A black baseball jersey with the text 'BLACK IS BEAUTIFUL' on the front, featuring white piping and a patch at the bottom.
values.claude: A black button-front baseball jersey featuring 'BLACK IS BEAUTIFUL' in white arched collegiate lettering across the chest, with white contrast piping along the placket and collar, white striped sleeve cuffs, and a Black Rose Collection woven patch near the hem.
values.gemini: A black short-sleeve baseball jersey with white piping and 'BLACK IS BEAUTIFUL' text arched across the chest. It features a button front and a patch on the lower left hem.
